title: Samurai Wolf II
original_title: 牙狼之介 地獄斬り
overview: Kiba Okaminosuke finds himself entangled with a group of prisoners being transported to their executions, one of whom oddly looks exactly like his dead father. There are crooked gold miners, a beautiful girl who is unfortunately a complete lunatic and a dojo master who is obsessed with killing Kiba just to prove that his school's sword style is the best.

trailers.title: Samurai Wolf 2: Hell Cut (1967) | Trailer | Hideo Gosha
